scripts.depcruise: find packages apps -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q . && dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --validate packages/ apps/ || echo 'No source files to cruise, skipping'
scripts.check: pnpm lint && turbo run typecheck && turbo run test && pnpm depcruise && turbo run build
